meta.title: False-positive result with BinaxNOW Legionella Antigen immunochromatographic (ICT) assay: response to Helbig et al. (2001)

abstractHtml: As in the paper by Helbig et al. (2001), we found a very weakly positive band with the BinaxNOW Legionella Antigen immunochromatographic (ICT) assay (Binax) in a urine sample from a patient who had an infection caused by a micro-organism other than Legionella pneumophila.
